ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF/X-DEFTS MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF RED APRON PIZZERIA, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350(B) (COMPARE NOTICE OF MOTION AND SEPARATE STATEMENT). THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, AS FRAMED, FAILS TO COMPLETELY DISPOSE OF THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. (COMPARE NOTICE OF MOTION 2:17-3:6 AND COMPLAINT 10:11-11:9). FINALLY TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT EXIST. (SEE PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S SEPARATE STATEMENT OF MATERIAL FACTS, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO FACTS 3 AND 10). ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Plaintiff Red Apron Pizzeria, Llc'S Motion For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joseph V. Diestel (415-981-5411) for Defendant/opposing party Samer Jweinat.
No other appearances.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Red Apron Pizzeria, LLC'S Motion For Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b) (Compare Notice of Motion and Separate Statement). The motion for summary adjudication, as framed, fails to completely dispose of the cause of action for declaratory relief. (Compare Notice of Motion 2:17-3:6 and Complaint 10:11-11:9). Finally triable issues of fact exist. (See Plaintiff's Response to Defendant's Separate Statement of Material Facts, including but not limited to facts 3 and 10). Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Red Apron Pizzeria Llc
Off Calendar Aug-02-2017 Text Ruling

No appearances.

Judge: Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
